user_request: Design a 50nm NMOS differential pair with PMOS active loads and an ideal tail current source. Use gm/Id LUT-based sizing, verify with LTspice OP/DC/AC/transient, and generate final project-local report/plots.
design_notes: This is the next analog validation topology after common-source amplifier.
Use ideal tail current source for first validation; do not build MOS tail source in this project.
The engine must derive gm/current from UGB and load, size matched devices from LUT, solve VIN_CM/VBP/ITAIL, and verify with real LTspice.
manual_reproducibility_expectation: Final report must include W/L/m, VIN_CM, VBP, ITAIL, VDD, CL_each, netlist paths, raw/log paths, and measurement summary so a designer can reproduce the LTspice schematic manually.
